description_zh: 上次毛打结严重,这次恢复干净 — 必须表扬进步
description_en: Previous matting issue cleared up — must explicitly praise progress

history.summary: 毛发明显打结,需要梳理

expectations.rationale: summary must call out the improvement

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须明确表扬主人的护理(从打结到干净是真实努力)
应该具体引用'14 天前打结 → 现在改善'的对比
应该鼓励继续当前的护理方法
qualitative_criteria_en: Must explicitly praise the owner's care (matting → clean is real effort)
Should specifically reference the '14 days ago matted → now improved' comparison
Should encourage continuing the current care routine
